case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL VS GUY, ROSETTA MARIE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,041.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION - DEPT. OF HUMAN SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT GUY, ROSETTA MARIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-28-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-08-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-13-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 FOR FURTHER PROGRESS REPORT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION - DEPT. OF HUMAN SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GUY, ROSETTA MARIE $1,791.00 PRINCIPAL, $25.87 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,816.87 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MISSED, THE ENTIRE BALANCE BECOMES DUE IMMEDIATELY
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GUY, ROSETTA MARIE

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-28-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-08-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 SETTLEMENT BETWEEN THE PARTIES. CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE CONT'D FOR 6 MONTH INTERVALS UNTIL PAID OFF AT WHICH TIME THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED W/ PREJUDICE. PAYMENTS
PYMTS ARE TO BE MADE @ THE RATE OF $50/MONTH BEG- INNING ON 9/30/04 & ON THE 30TH DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER UNTIL PAID IN FULL. IF ANY PAYMENT IS
